mapper.sql: id, trade_date, industry_name, stat_period, sample_count, trend_slope, intercept, r_squared, total_net_amount, avg_net_amount, std_net_amount, min_net_amount, max_net_amount, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO industry_trend_stat (trade_date, industry_name, stat_period, sample_count, trend_slope, intercept, r_squared, total_net_amount, avg_net_amount, std_net_amount, min_net_amount, max_net_amount) VALUES
(#{item.tradeDate}, #{item.industryName}, #{item.statPeriod}, #{item.sampleCount}, #{item.trendSlope}, #{item.intercept}, #{item.rSquared}, #{item.totalNetAmount}, #{item.avgNetAmount}, #{item.stdNetAmount}, #{item.minNetAmount}, #{item.maxNetAmount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), trend_slope = VALUES(trend_slope), intercept = VALUES(intercept), r_squared = VALUES(r_squared), total_net_amount = VALUES(total_net_amount), avg_net_amount = VALUES(avg_net_amount), std_net_amount = VALUES(std_net_amount), min_net_amount = VALUES(min_net_amount), max_net_amount = VALUES(max_net_amount), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT industry_name FROM industry_trend_stat ORDER BY industry_name
SELECT FROM industry_trend_stat WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} ORDER BY stat_period ASC, trend_slope DESC
